description_long: This is a single-story residential house set within a fenced yard, featuring a main building with multiple rooms and large windows. The property includes a detached structure, possibly a garage or guest house, and a circular above-ground pool. There is a small gazebo in one corner of the yard and a mature tree near the secondary building, adding greenery to the landscape. The main house has a flat roof and a modern, boxy architectural style with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, and the main entryway is accessible via a small porch area.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring a pool, gazebo, and detached structure.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main house facade, fenced yard, pool, gazebo, and a detached building with a tree nearby.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the detached structure and tree, with the main house and pool visible in the background.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a rear perspective, showing the back of the main house, the pool, and the gazebo in the far corner.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the side of the main house, the pool, and the gazebo, with the detached building and tree in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a small porch, flat overhang, and minimal decorative elements
